entry.title: Entry #334 in X Corp. v. Apple Inc., 4:25-cv-00914
entry.summary: ELECTRONIC ORDER granting 330 Application for Admission Pro Hac Vice of Andrew Baak. Important Reminder: Unless excused for cause, an attorney who is not an ECF user must register within 14 days of the date the attorney appears in a case pursuant to LR 5.1(f) and LCrR 49.2(g). (Ordered by Judge Mark Pittman on 6/16/2026)(chmb) (Entered: 06/16/2026)

entry.title: Entry #326 in X Corp. v. Apple Inc., 4:25-cv-00914
entry.summary: ORDER: The Court hereby ORDERS the 321 Motion is GRANTED IN PART and DENIED IN PART. Accordingly, the Court ORDERS that Plaintiffs must complete production of all responsive material and respond to the Court's Order in full by July 3, 2026. (Ordered by Judge Mark Pittman on 6/3/2026) (bdb) (Entered: 06/03/2026)

entry.title: Entry #325 in X Corp. v. Apple Inc., 4:25-cv-00914
entry.summary: RESPONSE filed by OpenAI OpCo, LLC, OpenAI, Inc., OpenAI, L.L.C. re: 321 Emergency MOTION to Extend Time to Comply with Magistrate Judge Hal R. Ray's May 13, 2026 Ruling 274 (Hancock, Katherine) (Entered: 06/03/2026)

entry.title: Entry #324 in X Corp. v. Apple Inc., 4:25-cv-00914
entry.summary: RESPONSE filed by Apple Inc re: 321 Emergency MOTION to Extend Time to Comply with Magistrate Judge Hal R. Ray's May 13, 2026 Ruling 274 (Wisenberg, Julia) (Entered: 06/03/2026)

entry.title: Entry #323 in X Corp. v. Apple Inc., 4:25-cv-00914
entry.summary: ORDER: Before the Court is the 321 Emergency Motion to Extend time. The Court hereby ORDERS both Defendants to respond to the Motion by 4:00 p.m., today, June 3, 2026. (Ordered by Judge Mark Pittman on 6/3/2026) (mmw) (Entered: 06/03/2026)

entry.title: Entry #322 in X Corp. v. Apple Inc., 4:25-cv-00914
entry.summary: Appendix in Support filed by X Corp, X.AI LLC re 321 Emergency MOTION to Extend Time to Comply with Magistrate Judge Hal R. Ray's May 13, 2026 Ruling 274 (Reiser, Craig) (Entered: 06/02/2026)

entry.title: Entry #321 in X Corp. v. Apple Inc., 4:25-cv-00914
entry.summary: Emergency MOTION to Extend Time to Comply with Magistrate Judge Hal R. Ray's May 13, 2026 Ruling 274 filed by X Corp, X.AI LLC with Brief/Memorandum in Support. (Attachments: # 1 Proposed Order) (Reiser, Craig) (Entered: 06/02/2026)

entry.title: Entry #320 in X Corp. v. Apple Inc., 4:25-cv-00914
entry.summary: ORDER: Before the Court is the Plaintiff's Objection to Magistrate Judge Rays Order. ECF No. 279 . After considering the relevant law, applicable docket entries, and relevant facts, the Court hereby ORDERS that the Objection is OVERRULED and Judge Ray's findings are AFFIRMED. Accordingly, the Motion to Stay is MOOT. ECF No. 307 . The Court reviews all factual findings to assess whether they are clearly erroneous and legal findings de novo. (Ordered by Judge Mark Pittman on 6/2/2026) (mmw) (Entered: 06/02/2026)

entry.title: Entry #319 in X Corp. v. Apple Inc., 4:25-cv-00914
entry.summary: Appendix in Support filed by X Corp, X.AI LLC re 318 Reply (Eisman, Scott) (Entered: 06/01/2026)

entry.title: Entry #318 in X Corp. v. Apple Inc., 4:25-cv-00914
entry.summary: REPLY filed by X Corp, X.AI LLC re: 279 Objection/Response to Magistrate Judge Order (Eisman, Scott) (Entered: 06/01/2026)

entry.title: Entry #317 in X Corp. v. Apple Inc., 4:25-cv-00914
entry.summary: (Document Restricted) Sealed Appendix in Support re: 316 Sealed and/or Ex Parte Response/Objection filed by OpenAI OpCo, LLC, OpenAI, Inc., OpenAI, L.L.C. (Notice: Any required service of this document is the responsibility of the filer.) (jnp) (Entered: 05/29/2026)
